creator: aeuii@posteo.de
text:
I have update the package [1] but it does not seem to be working properly:


$ aspell -a -m -d de_DE --encoding=utf-8
@(#) International Ispell Version 3.1.20 (but really Aspell 0.60.6.1)
hallo
# hallo 0


The English dict works well:


aspell -a -m -d en --encoding=utf-8 
@(#) International Ispell Version 3.1.20 (but really Aspell 0.60.6.1)
hello
*


PS would it be possible to add or make an alias called "de" instead of "de_DE"?


[1] # pkg info de-aspell-20161207_2 
de-aspell-20161207_2

Version        : 20161207_2
Installed on   : Mon Jan  7 12:23:07 2019 CET
